title: Graduate School of Social Sciences Activities
content:
Graduate School of Social Sciences Activities

Multidisciplinary Meeting

Hundreds of subjects and experts have participated in the Scientific Meeting (MDT), which has been held by NP Health Group every Wednesday between 9.00-11.00 for nearly 20 years. The purpose of the meetings held on Wednesday every week; To renew the professional knowledge of doctors, psychologists and other professional groups serving in NPGRUP, to ensure that they follow current developments, and to cooperate between branches. Diseases, new treatment methods, and case analyzes are also carried out at the meetings, in which experts from outside the institution also participate as speakers.

The TürkSch Project and its Relationship with Dynamic Changes in the Broad Psychosis Phenotype

Wednesday, July 13, 2022

The guest of the Scientific Meeting was this week Psychiatrist Dr. Ceylan Ergül Arslan. In the presentation made under the title of "TürkSch Project and Social Capital's Relationship with Dynamic Changes in the Broad Psychosis Phenotype"; the data of the TürkSch project was explained in detail.

Video Analysis of TED Speakers

Wednesday, July 06, 2022

This week's MDT meeting featured Elyn Saks' video on "Mental Diseases". In addition, Robert Waldinger's video published in TED titled "What to Do for a Good Life" was featured. Our experts who participated in the scientific meeting contributed with their comments and analyzes on the topics of the videos.

EEG Frequency Bands in Psychiatric Disorders

Wednesday, June 15, 2022

There were two guests of this week's Scientific Meeting. The second presentation of the Scientific Meeting was made by Psychiatrist Dr. Elvan Çiftçi. In the presentation titled “EEG Frequency Bands in Psychiatric Disorders”, the evaluation of EEG frequency settings in psychiatric diseases was explained. In the presentation, which mentioned a study conducted in the USA, information was given about the details of 184 EEG studies.
